name: Energy Transfer L.P. 7.625% Series D Fixed-to-Floating Rate Cumulative Redeemable Perpetual Preferred Unit
summary: Energy Transfer L.P. is a master limited partnership (MLP) engaged in the transportation, storage, and processing of natural gas and crude oil. The company's preferred units represent an ownership stake in a specific series of preferred equity. Energy Transfer L.P. is headquartered in Dallas, Texas.
